extensionDescription.message: Ferramenta gratuita de captura de tela e gravação. Capture, anote e grave — sem limites, sem conta, 100% local.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description shown in Chrome Web Store and extension management

captureVisible.description: Button label for visible area screenshot

captureFullPage.description: Button label for full page screenshot

captureSelection.description: Button label for area selection screenshot

screenshotSaved.description: Notification title after saving a screenshot

screenshotCopied.description: Notification title after copying to clipboard

recordingSaved.description: Notification title after saving a recording

recordingInterrupted.description: Notification title when recording is interrupted by SW termination

refreshBanner.message: ScreenBolt foi atualizado. Atualize esta página para continuar usando.
refreshBanner.description: Banner message shown when extension context is invalidated

selectionInstructions.message: Clique e arraste para selecionar a área • ESC para cancelar

restrictedUrl.message: Não é possível capturar esta página (URL restrita)
restrictedUrl.description: Error message for chrome:// and other restricted pages

pipWebcam.description: Toggle label for picture-in-picture webcam overlay

recordingInProgress.description: Status text shown during active recording

pageTooLarge.message: Página muito grande para capturar (mais de $MAX_HEIGHT$ pixels de altura). Tente capturar a área visível.
pageTooLarge.description: Error when full-page capture would exceed memory limits
